title: Urgent traffic alert: Stop and Go N2 Wilderness
description: GEORGE NEWS - A motor vehicle accident has...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A motor vehicle accident has occurred on the N2 near Wilderness, just after the Ebb and Flow turnoff.


> A Stop and Go system is in place.


All emergency services are on the scene.

Please reduce speed and drive cautiously.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
